title: EcoShop GUI X
description: EcoShop GUI X is a modern, high-performance GUI-based shop plugin for Minecraft servers.
body:
🌿 EcoShop GUI X

⚡ Next-Gen Intelligent Economy Shop System
Smooth GUI • Dynamic Pricing • Smart Economy • Zero Lag

---

🚀 Overview

EcoShop GUI X is a modern, high-performance Minecraft shop plugin designed for premium servers. Built for Paper 1.20+, it delivers a fully interactive GUI-based shop system powered by Vault + EssentialsX.

---

✨ Features

🛒 Advanced GUI Shop

  • Clean and modern interface
  • Category-based navigation
  • Buy & Sell system
  • Pagination support

💰 Economy Integration

  • Works with Vault + EssentialsX
  • Plug & play setup
  • Supports all Vault-based plugins

📈 Dynamic Pricing

  • Prices adjust based on demand
  • Configurable multipliers
  • Balanced economy system

📊 Transaction History

  • Player transaction logs
  • Global tracking system
  • Future analytics ready
---

📁 File Structure

plugins/EcoShopGUI/
 ├── config.yml
 ├── sections/
 ├── shops/
 └── transactions/
---

🧩 Commands

/shop           → Open shop
/shop reload    → Reload configs
/shop history   → View transactions
---

🔐 Permissions

ecoshopex.use
ecoshopex.admin
ecoshopex.sell
---

🛠️ Requirements

  • Paper / Spigot 1.20+
  • Vault
  • EssentialsX
---

💎 Why EcoShop GUI X?

✔ Premium GUI Experience
✔ Smart Economy System
✔ Fully Configurable
✔ Developer-Friendly API
✔ Built for Modern Servers

---

🌟 Support

If you like this plugin, consider ⭐ supporting and sharing!

---
🚀 Level Up Your Server Economy
